evals.prompt: How do I set up golangci-lint for my Go project and which linters should I enable?
evals.expected_output: Create .golangci.yml at repo root. Enable: errcheck, staticcheck, govet, revive, gosec. Run golangci-lint run ./... in CI. Use the golangci.yml example for configuration.

evals.prompt: What's the difference between gofmt and goimports? Which should I use?
evals.expected_output: goimports does everything gofmt does (formatting) plus organizes imports. Use goimports — never gofmt alone. Run goimports -w . before committing.

evals.prompt: How do I get real-time Go diagnostics and type errors in Claude Code?
evals.expected_output: Use the mcp__ide__getDiagnostics tool via the gopls-lsp plugin. Install gopls with: go install golang.org/x/tools/gopls@latest. getDiagnostics gives real-time compiler-level feedback without running go build.

should_not_trigger: Write a table-driven test in Go
How do I implement Clean Architecture in Go?
Build a REST API handler with Echo
